سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط ‏ لدينا.⁦ ⁩‏⁦ ⁩حدد قبول للموافقة أو رفض لرفض ملفات تعريف الارتباط غير الأساسية لهذا الاستخدام. يمكنك تحديث اختياراتك في أي وقت في ‏ settings ‏.⁦ ⁩ قبول رفض التخطي إلى HungerStation is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. Job Description To lead and oversee HS’s efforts to use technology, in order to drive the development and implementation of financial technology solutions to enhance financial processes, customer transactions, and overall business efficiency. Fintech Develop and execute Hungerstation’s financial technology strategy in alignment with business growth, digital transformation, and customer experience objectives. Lead the design and implementation of scalable fintech solutions to support high-volume transactions across customers, merchants, riders, and internal finance operations. Drive innovation in payment systems, digital wallets, refunds, settlements, and reconciliation processes to ensure speed, accuracy, and reliability. Partner closely with Product, Engineering, Data, Operations, and Finance teams to embed fintech solutions seamlessly into Hungerstation’s platform and operational workflows. Ensure full compliance with Saudi regulatory requirements (SAMA, ZATCA, VAT, data protection) and Delivery Hero group policies, while proactively managing fintech-related risks and controls. Oversee fraud detection, transaction monitoring, and cybersecurity measures related to financial systems and digital payments. Own and manage the fintech budget, ensuring cost efficiency, ROI optimization, and sustainable investment in new technologies and partnerships. Analyze financial and transaction data to identify trends, revenue opportunities, cost optimization areas, and system performance improvements. Prepare executive-level financial technology reports and dashboards, providing insights on transaction performance, risk exposure, and innovation impact. Lead and develop a high-performing fintech team, fostering a culture of ownership, innovation, and continuous improvement in line with Hungerstation’s leadership principles. Stay ahead of emerging fintech trends (open banking, embedded finance, BNPL, digital wallets, AI-driven fraud prevention) and assess their relevance to Hungerstation’s ecosystem. Build and manage strategic relationships with banks, payment providers, fintech startups, and regulatory bodies to strengthen Hungerstation’s financial infrastructure. Support business expansion initiatives by enabling new financial products and services for merchants and customers (e.g.,
submit.jd_text: HungerStation is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. Job Description To lead and oversee HS’s efforts to use technology, in order to drive the development and implementation of financial technology solutions to enhance financial processes, customer transactions, and overall business efficiency. Fintech Develop and execute Hungerstation’s financial technology strategy in alignment with business growth, digital transformation, and customer experience objectives. Lead the design and implementation of scalable fintech solutions to support high-volume transactions across customers, merchants, riders, and internal finance operations. Drive innovation in payment systems, digital wallets, refunds, settlements, and reconciliation processes to ensure speed, accuracy, and reliability. Partner closely with Product, Engineering, Data, Operations, and Finance teams to embed fintech solutions seamlessly into Hungerstation’s platform and operational workflows. Ensure full compliance with Saudi regulatory requirements (SAMA, ZATCA, VAT, data protection) and Delivery Hero group policies, while proactively managing fintech-related risks and controls. Oversee fraud detection, transaction monitoring, and cybersecurity measures related to financial systems and digital payments. Own and manage the fintech budget, ensuring cost efficiency, ROI optimization, and sustainable investment in new technologies and partnerships. Analyze financial and transaction data to identify trends, revenue opportunities, cost optimization areas, and system performance improvements. Prepare executive-level financial technology reports and dashboards, providing insights on transaction performance, risk exposure, and innovation impact. Lead and develop a high-performing fintech team, fostering a culture of ownership, innovation, and continuous improvement in line with Hungerstation’s leadership principles. Stay ahead of emerging fintech trends (open banking, embedded finance, BNPL, digital wallets, AI-driven fraud prevention) and assess their relevance to Hungerstation’s ecosystem. Build and manage strategic relationships with banks, payment providers, fintech startups, and regulatory bodies to strengthen Hungerstation’s financial infrastructure. Support business expansion initiatives by enabling new financial products and services for merchants and customers (e.g., faster settlements, flexible payment options, and value-added financial tools). Strategy & Planning Contribute to the development and execution of the Division’s ABCs and OKRs, while ensuring alignment with other Functions' heads. Make critical decisions that support the Division's strategic and tactical direction.
submit.verdict_reason: C-suite FinTech Director at e-commerce giant; payments/digital wallets/fraud detection aligned with FinTech domain; Riyadh is target location; KS=16
ats_gaps: Missing: project management, pmo, program management
Entry-level role

Associate Director Project Control Mace الرياض الرياض السعودية قبل ٤ أيام ١٣٣ من المتقدمين معرفة من قامت شركة Mace بتعيينه التقدم انضم أو سجل الدخول للعثور على وظيفتك التالية انضم للتقدم إلى وظيفة ⁦ ⁩‏Associate Director Project Control‏⁦ ⁩ في ⁦ ⁩‏Mace‏ البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. حفظ الإبلاغ عن هذه الوظيفة Mace combines construction expertise with consultancy to unlock potential in every person or project and redefine the boundaries of ambition. Our values shape the way we consult and define the people we want to join us on our journey. The Project This is an opportunity to work on one of the largest programmes in Saudi Arabia. This unique project consists of major mixed-use development including sports facilities, entertainment, and arts along with all associated infrastructure. Mace is one of the delivery partners requiring high-calibre and experienced professionals to lead integrated teams throughout each phase of the project. You’ll Be Responsible For Lead PMO and project controls performance, designing frameworks and strategies to deliver excellence. Act as trusted advisor, building strong client relationships and providing subject matter expertise. Direct project teams in cost, schedule, change, risk, and reporting to achieve key objectives. Manage baselines, monitor delivery performance, and oversee quantitative risk analysis for cost and time. Drive structured governance, reporting, and compliance with Mace Control Centre and industry standards. Mentor and develop junior team members, fostering capability while championing sustainability and net zero carbon goals. You’ll Need To Have Degree in construction, engineering, or related discipline; chartered membership preferred. Significant PMO and project controls leadership on major programmes. Expert knowledge of tools, techniques, and software including Primavera, Power BI, and risk systems. Proven ability to design frameworks, manage uncertainty, and deliver assurance strategies. Our values Safety first - Going home safe and well: We champion a safe, diverse and inclusive working environment, understanding the importance of wellbeing in every team. Client focus - Deliver on our promise: We own the quality of deliverables, strategic outcomes and build long-term relationships with our clients. Integrity - Always do the right thing: We influence positive outcomes within our industry, while always aligning with our compliance obligations. Create opportunity - For our people to excel: We champion a continuous improvement culture throughout all activities, inspiring our people and teams to develop. Mace is an inclusive employer and welcomes interest from a diverse range of candidates. Even if you feel you do not fulfil all the criteria, please apply as you may still be the best candidate for this role or another role within our organisation. We are also open to discussing part-time, flexible, and hybrid working options if suitable within the role. site Show more Show less مستوى الأقدمية غير مطبق نوع التوظيف دوام كامل المهام الوظيفية الإدارة و التصنيع المجالات إنشاءات، الهندسة المدنية، و الهندسة المعمارية والتخطيط تزيد الترشيحات من فرصك في الوصول لمقابلة الوظيفة في شركة Mace، إلى الضعف عرض الأشخاص الذين تعرفهم احصل على إشعارات عندما يتم نشر وظيفة جديدة. تعيين تنبيه سجِّل الدخول لتعيين تنبيهات الوظائف لوظائف ”‏مدير بقسم مراقبة المشروعات‏“. البريد الإلكترو

review.title: Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services
review.jd_page_text: تقوم شركة S&P Global بالتوظيف لوظيفة Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services في Riyadh Region | LinkedIn تحترم LinkedIn خصوصيتك ‏⁦ ⁩تستخدم LinkedIn والأطراف الخارجية ملفات تعريف الارتباط الأساسية وغير الأساسية لتوفير خدماتنا وتأمينها وتحليلها وتحسينها، وعرض الإعلانات ذات الصلة (بما في ذلك ⁦ ⁩إعلانات الوظائف والاحترافية⁦ ⁩) داخل وخارج LinkedIn. معرفة المزيد من خلال ‏ سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط ‏ لدينا.⁦ ⁩‏⁦ ⁩حدد قبول للموافقة أو رفض لرفض ملفات تعريف الارتباط غير الأساسية لهذا الاستخدام. يمكنك تحديث اختياراتك في أي وقت في ‏ settings ‏.⁦ ⁩ قبول رفض التخطي إلى المحتوى الرئيسي LinkedIn Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services في باريس توسيع البحث يعرض هذا الزر نوع البحث المحدد حاليًا. عند توسعته، يوفر قائمة بخيارات البحث التي من شأنها تغيير مدخل البحث لمطابقة الاختيار الحالي. الوظائف الأشخاص منصة التعليم مسح النص مسح النص مسح النص مسح النص مسح النص تسجيل الدخول انضم الآن Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services S&P Global Riyadh Region التقدم انضم أو سجل الدخول للعثور على وظيفتك التالية انضم للتقدم إلى وظيفة ⁦ ⁩‏Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services‏⁦ ⁩ في ⁦ ⁩‏S&P Global‏ البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services S&P Global Riyadh Region قبل ٢ أيام أكثر من ٢٠٠ متقدم معرفة من قامت شركة S&P Global بتعيينه التقدم انضم أو سجل الدخول للعثور على وظيفتك التالية انضم للتقدم إلى وظيفة ⁦ ⁩‏Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services‏⁦ ⁩ في ⁦ ⁩‏S&P Global‏ البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. حفظ الإبلاغ عن هذه الوظيفة استخدم الذكاء الاصطناعي لتقييم مدى ملاءمتك احصل على مشورة مستندة إلى الذكاء الاصطناعي بشأن هذه الوظيفة وغيرها من الميزات الحصرية. هل أنا مناسب لهذه الوظيفة؟ تخصيص سيرتي الذاتية تسجيل الدخول للوصول إلى المشورة المستندة إلى الذكاء الاصطناعي البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. تسجيل الدخول لتقييم مهاراتك البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. تسجيل الدخول لتخصيص سيرتك الذاتية البريد الإلكتروني أو رقم الهاتف كلمة المرور عرض هل نسيت كلمة المرور؟ تسجيل الدخول تسجيل الدخول باستخدام البريد الإلكتروني أو عضو جديد على LinkedIn؟ انضم الآن بالنقر على الاستمرار للانضمام أو تسجيل الدخول، فأنت توافق على اتفاقية المستخدم و اتفاقية الخصوصية و سياسة ملفات تعريف الارتباط على LinkedIn. About The Role Grade Level (for internal use): 12 The Role: Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services The Team: The candidate will be responsible for leading S&P Global’s Climate and Sustainability Services market expansion throughout the Kingdom, focusing on three primary client pillars: Financial Institutions, Non-Financial Corporates in hard-to-abate sectors, and Government Related Entities (GREs). This role demands deep client engagement and high-level strategic conversations, requiring the ability to connect across ministries, national champions, regulators, corporates, and financial institutions. Key expectations include building a robust on-the-ground network, meeting with senior executives and project owners, pitching tailored sustainability solutions, and designing offerings that leverage the full range of S&P Global’s data, analytics, platforms, and advisory services. The candidate will play a pivotal role in positioning S&P Global as a trusted partner in climate and sustainability, ensuring that client needs are met with innovative and impactful solutions. Responsibilities And Impact Market Expansion & Positioning - Establish S&P Global’s sustainability and climate services in KSA and boost local market presence through ongoing engagement with ministries, corporates, and financial institutions. Build a strong network to enhance visibility and leadership. Client Engagement & Relationship Building - Cultivate lasting relationships with senior decision-makers and engage in informed discussions on climate, transition
review.jd_text: About The Role Grade Level (for internal use): 12 The Role: Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services The Team: The candidate will be responsible for leading S&P Global’s Climate and Sustainability Services market expansion throughout the Kingdom, focusing on three primary client pillars: Financial Institutions, Non-Financial Corporates in hard-to-abate sectors, and Government Related Entities (GREs). This role demands deep client engagement and high-level strategic conversations, requiring the ability to connect across ministries, national champions, regulators, corporates, and financial institutions. Key expectations include building a robust on-the-ground network, meeting with senior executives and project owners, pitching tailored sustainability solutions, and designing offerings that leverage the full range of S&P Global’s data, analytics, platforms, and advisory services. The candidate will play a pivotal role in positioning S&P Global as a trusted partner in climate and sustainability, ensuring that client needs are met with innovative and impactful solutions. Responsibilities And Impact Market Expansion & Positioning - Establish S&P Global’s sustainability and climate services in KSA and boost local market presence through ongoing engagement with ministries, corporates, and financial institutions. Build a strong network to enhance visibility and leadership. Client Engagement & Relationship Building - Cultivate lasting relationships with senior decision-makers and engage in informed discussions on climate, transition planning, ESG, and sustainability. Act as a strategic partner for continuous client engagement. Business Development & Growth - Pursue new opportunities with financial institutions, corporates, and government entities. Lead pitches and design tailored solutions utilizing S&P’s offerings. Lead internal teams in preparing proposals aligned with regional priorities. Solution Integration & Delivery Coordination - Turn client needs into actionable projects using data, analytics, and advisory platforms. Coordinate globally for seamless delivery and contribute to RHQ’s balanced onshore/offshore delivery model. What We’re Looking For Basic Qualifications: Exclusive for Saudi Nationals and be based in Riyadh to ensure essential on-the-ground presence 10+ years of experience in a consulting role, ideally covering banking, investment, risk, financing, or sustainability-related areas Demonstrate fluency in Arabic and English, with exceptional business writing and executive-level communication skills Proven experience building or scaling a business, team, or regional market presence Strong, hands-on experience in sustainability and climate topics, including advisory, technical analysis, or climate-related risk Deep technical knowledge of ISSB, PCAF, GRI, and decarbonization standards Experience with quantification of financed emissions, such as PCAF methodologies Familiarity
review.verdict_reason: Director-level BD for climate services is adjacent to transformation advisory; S&P Global is reputable; sustainability is not a core domain though
ats_gaps: Missing: digital transformation, project management, pmo
